meta.chaos_note: Burst densities and team counts are synthetic. See CHAOS.md (top of extreme_week.py) for interpretation guidance.

cross_week.cache_efficacy_note: Fraction of cold-render time saved by cache, weighted by render count. 1.0 = warm is instant; 0 = cache has no measurable effect (either no hits or renders were already fast). External proxy — Perseus's internal cache telemetry would be more precise.

weekend_decay.interpretation: ≈ 1.0 means weekend cold start matches Day-1 cold start (TTL fully expired). >1 means the second cold start is slower. <1 means something cached survived.

projections.cache_payback: After ~11.8 warm renders, cumulative time drops below running each cold (0.31s cold → 0.28s warm).
